allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('\\n'.join\(f'{k}: {v}' for k,v in {**d.get\('dependencies',{}\), **d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}.items\(\)\)\)")
